channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothol is over 2 foot long and deep., 30th May
item.description:
Pothole makes it very dangerous to enter into the road without swerving or damaging wheel rims. I have seen cyclists try to avoid this by using the wrong side of the road into on coming traffic.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Crescent, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 17 Brondesbury villas, 30th May
item.description:
Picture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Overflowing bins and rubbish everywhere near kids playground, 30th May
item.description:
These bins have been overflowing for some time. Rubbish is spilling in the street, it’s right near a playground and park, lots of kids and dogs walk by.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jackman Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of wood with nails in and other bits. Been there for weeks, nails sticking out is dangerous, 30th May
item.description:
Fly tipping of wood with nails sticking out, dangerous. Other random bits as well like a rug and a cover from the market

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadway Market, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bigger bits are regularly falling off the tree, 30th May
item.description:
The tree has been shedding small branches for a while but larger ones are now falling. The one in the picture hit me and broke when it hit the ground. It was 2 feet long and nearly an inch thick. Maintenance to remove dead branches is required.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lytchet Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous parking / Traffic hazard report – residential estate N8 Mary Neuner Road, 30th May
item.description:
I am writing to report a delivery van belonging to [insert company name, e.g., Amazon that has parked extremely dangerously on a sharp bend, right on double yellow lines inside a residential estate. ​The driver has left the vehicle unattended to deliver parcels. Still, the chosen parking spot completely blocks the view and creates a severe traffic hazard for other road users and pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Mary Neuner Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bags left out days early, 30th May
item.description:
Recycling is collected Tuesday yet local residents leave the bags outside days early all the time - ongoing issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Misuse of disability rail and pavement obstruction, 30th May
item.description:
The disability rail has been shaky for over 2 years and has still not been repaired - people keep using it to secure their bikes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped on pavement, 30th May
item.description:
As per image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by random strangers, 30th May
item.description:
Both set of communal bins and area full of items ie duvets, furnitures and other goods, no space for residents of Fairchild house to empty their bins.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fanshaw Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I’m east end Brondesbury villas, 30th May
item.description:
See photos

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - local residents (AGAIN), 30th May
item.description:
As per image, ongoing 24/7 by local residents

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime E-hire Bikes fallen of the stands and Park in overcrowded Parking Bay, 30th May
item.description:
Lime E-hire Bikes fallen of the stands and Park in overcrowded Parking Bay Park very Dangerous might hurt somebody. St Martin's Lane, outside London Coliseum Theatre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 112, St Martin's Lane, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground, 30th May
item.description:
I would also like to report that people who work on the Broadway Market are regularly using areas around the playground as a toilet on Saturdays. As this is a children's play area, it creates an unhygienic environment and should be addressed
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jackman Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extreme littering around Holiday Inn, 30th May
item.description:
The entire garden area surrounding the Holiday Inn adjacent to the pavement is extremely badly littered. Many of the pieces of trash have been there for a long time. Some of the pieces like traffic cones and temporary road signs left to rot were clearly thrown there by council road crews.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground, 30th May
item.description:
Would like to report a concern at the playground. There appear to be homeless individuals sleeping in the playground area, and they have a dog that is often left unattended. It is barking at people passing by
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jackman Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously, 30th May
item.description:
Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extreme littering, 30th May
item.description:
The entire Blackwall Lane from the Holiday Inn towards central Greenwich is littered very heavily. There are even traffic cones and temporary road signs left there to rot by the Holiday Inn. An especially terrible spot is the access road from the Blackwall Tunnel approach connecting to Blackwall Lane. Some of these pieces of trash have been there for >1 year.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 30th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped a fridge on the pavement nearby 25 Anerley Park. There is also a dumped oven a bit further up the street nearby 29 Anerley Park on the pavement. Please can these be removed. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light is facing the wrong way, 30th May
item.description:
Traffic light is facing the wrong way, not easy to see which lane it is meant for.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Mayplace Road East, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction
